mapper.insert: insert into tb_notification (worker_id, type, title, content, is_read, biz_type, biz_id, create_time) values (#{workerId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, '0', #{bizType}, #{bizId}, now())
mapper.select: select * from tb_notification where worker_id = #{workerId} order by create_time desc limit 50
select count(*) from tb_notification where worker_id = #{workerId} and is_read = '0'
mapper.update: update tb_notification set is_read = '1' where id = #{id}
